scripts.build: vite build -c vite.main.config.ts && vite build -c vite.preload.config.ts && vite build -c vite.renderer.config.ts
scripts.test:e2e: pnpm run build:swb-bin && pnpm run build && playwright test
scripts.capture:screenshot: pnpm run build:swb-bin && pnpm run build && SWB_DESKTOP_SCREENSHOT_PATH=../docs/stackbench-workbench-macos.png playwright test --grep @desktop-smoke
